summary: Complete frontend testing of Trend Syria homepage UI improvements. All requested features tested and working correctly: Hero section, Features, Categories, Products, CTA, product cards with images/prices, category icons, 'New' badges, favorite button, and product navigation.
passed_tests: ✅ Homepage loads with all sections (Hero, Features, Categories, Products, CTA)
✅ Hero section displays 'تريند سورية' heading with orange accent
✅ 4 Feature cards visible: توصيل مجاني, ضمان الجودة, دفع آمن, دعم 24/7
✅ Categories section with 10 category icons (إلكترونيات, أزياء, المنزل, etc.)
✅ Category icons clickable - navigate to filtered products page
✅ Featured Products section shows 6 product cards
✅ Product cards display images, Arabic names, and prices in Syrian Pounds (ل.س)
✅ 'جديد' (New) badges appear on new products (6 badges found)
✅ Favorite button shows 'يجب تسجيل الدخول' toast when not logged in
✅ Favorite button adds product to favorites when logged in (red heart + toast 'تمت الإضافة')
✅ Product click navigates to product details page (/products/{id})
✅ Product details page shows product info, price, reviews section
✅ CTA banner 'هل أنت بائع؟' with 'سجل كبائع مجاناً' button
✅ Mobile responsive design with 2-column grid and bottom navigation
✅ Light mode with orange (#FF6B00) accent color theme
seed_data_creation: Data seeded automatically on homepage load via /api/seed endpoint
context_for_next_testing_agent: Homepage UI improvements fully tested. All product cards have data-testid='product-card-{id}', favorite buttons have data-testid='favorite-{id}', categories have data-testid='category-{id}'. Login form uses data-testid='login-btn' and data-testid='login-submit-btn'. Light mode with orange accent theme. No add-to-cart button on homepage product cards (by design per agent notes).

list: ShamCash Payment API - accepts any 6-digit OTP for testing (from previous iteration)
